items.summary: Implement the automated grid order placement logic in the backend: when the bot is running, compute buy and sell grid levels based on the configured spread and order count parameters, then place limit orders on both sides of the current mid price across those grid levels.

Implement the periodic timer-driven bot loop in the backend: on each timer tick (based on the configured interval), fetch the latest market mid price, recompute the grid, cancel stale or out-of-range orders, and place new grid orders as needed.
Expose a backend query method to retrieve currently open orders so the frontend OpenOrdersPanel can display the live grid state.
Update the frontend BotControlPanel to reflect the bot's running/stopped state accurately after the timer-driven loop is wired up, and surface any order placement errors reported by the backend.
